envoy_host.name: Gateway Host
envoy_host.description: IP address or hostname of the IQ Gateway (e.g. envoy.local or 192.168.1.50).

envoy_serial.name: Gateway Serial
envoy_serial.description: Gateway serial number, used when minting a token. Leave empty to auto-detect from /info.xml.

enlighten_email.name: Enlighten Email
enlighten_email.description: Enphase Enlighten account email. Required for automatic token refresh. Leave empty if supplying a manual token.

enlighten_password.name: Enlighten Password
enlighten_password.description: Enphase Enlighten account password. Used only to mint/refresh the local gateway token; never leaves the add-on.

manual_token.name: Manual Token (optional)
manual_token.description: Paste a token from enlighten.enphaseenergy.com/entrez-auth-token?serial_num=... to skip cloud login. Cannot auto-refresh; supply credentials for hands-off renewal.

mqtt_host.name: MQTT Host
mqtt_host.description: MQTT broker hostname. Leave empty to auto-detect from Home Assistant.

mqtt_user.name: MQTT Username
mqtt_user.description: MQTT username. Leave empty to auto-detect from Home Assistant.

mqtt_pass.name: MQTT Password
mqtt_pass.description: MQTT password. Leave empty to auto-detect from Home Assistant.

poll_interval.name: Poll Interval
poll_interval.description: Seconds between poll cycles (2-300). The livedata feed updates ~1 Hz; 5 s is a sensible default.

debug.name: Debug Logging
debug.description: Enable verbose debug output (logs every HTTP request).
